    A

    AlertSystem - Class in Unnamed Package
    Manages notification delivery by using composition.
    AlertSystem(NotificationMedium) - Constructor for class AlertSystem
    Creates an AlertSystem with the provided notification medium.

    E

    EmailService - Class in Unnamed Package
    Sends notification messages through an email service.
    EmailService() - Constructor for class EmailService
    Creates a new EmailService.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class AlertSystem
    Demonstrates the flexible notification system from the command line.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class MaintenanceTest
    Runs the command-line test for the maintenance enhancement.
    MaintenanceTest - Class in Unnamed Package
    Tests the maintenance enhancement for the flexible notification system.
    MaintenanceTest() - Constructor for class MaintenanceTest
    Creates a new MaintenanceTest.

    N

    NotificationMedium - Interface in Unnamed Package
    Defines the behavior required for any notification delivery medium.
    notifyUser(String) - Method in class AlertSystem
    Sends a message using the currently active notification medium.

    P

    printMessageLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
    Displays all messages sent during the current session.

    S

    send(String) - Method in class EmailService
    Sends the given message as an email notification.
    send(String) - Method in interface NotificationMedium
    Sends a notification message.
    send(String) - Method in class SMSService
    Sends the given message as an SMS notification.
    send(String) - Method in class WhatsAppService
    Sends the given message as a WhatsApp notification.
    setMedium(NotificationMedium) - Method in class AlertSystem
    Changes the active notification medium.
    SMSService - Class in Unnamed Package
    Sends notification messages through an SMS service.
    SMSService() - Constructor for class SMSService
    Creates a new SMSService.

    W

    WhatsAppService - Class in Unnamed Package
    Sends notification messages through a WhatsApp service.
    WhatsAppService() - Constructor for class WhatsAppService
    Creates a new WhatsAppService.
